title: commersonia corylifolia
intro: Commersonia corylifolia, also known as the quandong, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Commersonia corylifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Commersonia corylifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsules, or tincture, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
